name: transaction-type-broker-correction-wins
rationale: Broker initial intake states transaction_type 'purchase' (mentions 'buying property'). loan_application doc shows 'purchase'. Broker subsequently corrects to 'refinance' (clarified the deal is actually a refi, broker initial framing was wrong). F1.TT first inferential canonical field per R11-A; canonical-map resolves to broker_correction tier ('refinance'). Tests broker_correction overriding initial_intent for inferential field.
notes: Two-event sequence. R11-A anchor — first inferential canonical field with explicit source-hierarchy.
